derivation_steps: Apply the lower-inclusive confidence threshold of 0.70 to every observed edge.
Include edge-at-boundary because confidence exactly equal to 0.70 satisfies the lower-inclusive threshold.
Include edge-a and edge-b because their confidence values are above 0.70.
Apply the scenario-output confidence kill threshold independently from edge admission: kill only when confidence is below 0.80.
Retain scenario-at-kill-boundary because confidence exactly equal to 0.80 satisfies the lower-inclusive output threshold.
Kill scenario-below-kill-boundary because confidence 0.79 is below 0.80.
Treat an absent edge as unknown coverage rather than evidence of no relationship.
Constrain the result to scenario sensitivity and prohibit causal claims.
provenance.claim_ceiling: deterministic graph-admission, scenario-kill-boundary, and output-label regression only
